title: Coach assignment role catalog
description: The four assignment roles + their operational semantics. Reference for SDUI + observer enforcement.

operational.note: Exactly one head_coach per active assignable. Enforced by partial unique index + observer. Head coach makes lineup + strategy decisions.
Multiple allowed per assignable. Cap configurable via coaching.assignment.max_assistants_per_assignable (default 3). Assists head coach; may run substitutions but not lineup.
Non-participating role. Used for evaluators, mentor-coaches auditing, student-coaches shadowing, cross-branch guest coaches watching.
On-call role. The assignment carries an `activated_at` metadata field when the substitute steps in for an absent head or assistant. Notifications route only when activated.

notes: SDUI role-picker sorts by sort_order (head_coach first — the most important choice).
The `authority_level` column drives future permission-derived checks (Wave 4+ session attendance module considers only 'primary' + 'secondary' as decision-makers for check-in flow).

Role transitions on existing assignments are allowed with an admin permission — for example, promoting an assistant to head_coach when the current head_coach's assignment ends. The observer re-runs the head-coach uniqueness check on transition.
